title: mimulus nasutus var. eximius
intro: Mimulus nasutus var. eximius, also known as the Purple Monkey Flower, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Phrymaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Mimulus nasutus var. eximius include its ability to reduce swelling, promote healing, and protect against bacterial and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for a range of applications from topical treatments to internal remedies.
